functional_requirements.title: User Registration
functional_requirements.description: Allow users to register with email and password.
acceptance_criteria: Users can enter a valid email and password.
User receives a confirmation email upon successful registration.

functional_requirements.title: Daily Habit Tracking
functional_requirements.description: Enable users to track daily habits.
acceptance_criteria: Users can add, edit, and delete habits.
Users can mark habits as completed for each day.

functional_requirements.title: Habit Analytics
functional_requirements.description: Provide analytics for habit completion rates.
acceptance_criteria: Users can view completion rates in weekly and monthly views.

non_functional_requirements.requirement: The system should support at least 1000 concurrent users.
non_functional_requirements.metric: Response time under 2 seconds for 95% of requests.

non_functional_requirements.requirement: The system must encrypt user data at rest and in transit.
non_functional_requirements.metric: Compliance with AES-256 for data at rest and TLS 1.2 for data in transit.

user_stories.i_want: to register an account with my email
user_stories.so_that: I can start tracking my daily habits.
I can monitor my personal development.

constraints: The web application must be compatible with the latest versions of major web browsers.
assumptions: Users have access to the internet to use the web application.
